# SalesOgre AI
> The Revenue System of Action. A sales automation platform built by salespeople, for salespeople.

SalesOgre AI is a sales automation platform for mid-market and enterprise B2B teams. In contrast to systems of record (CRM, which stores data) and systems of insight (call recorders, which explain data), SalesOgre is a system of action: it captures deal signals across Zoom, Salesforce, ServiceNow, Gmail, Outlook and calendars; reads buying-committee dynamics (identifying nervous stakeholders, blockers, champions, and supporters from communication patterns); coaches account executives stage-by-stage and meeting-by-meeting, recalibrating whenever notes are added; and executes next best actions automatically — drafting outreach, building champion toolkits, scheduling meetings, and keeping the CRM updated — with human approval on outbound work.

Key positioning: "The CRM is dead. It has never helped you close a deal, build pipeline, or sell — it is just another place data sits. Systems of record remember. SalesOgre acts."

Product ladder: SalesOgre Coach (free deal coaching) → SalesOgre in Chrome (the full platform as a browser extension that reads Salesforce, Gmail, Zoom and ServiceNow screens locally — deliberately non-agentic: it drafts and stages all work for human approval, covering ~90% of a seller's needs with zero autonomy risk) → Enterprise Platform (direct API integrations, with autonomy available only behind approval gates).

## Pages
- [Home](https://www.salesogre.com/): platform overview, evidence base, the record→insight→action ladder
- [SalesOgre in Chrome](https://www.salesogre.com/chrome.html): the full platform in the browser — local screen reading, non-agentic by design, the case against agentic AI for 99% of salespeople
- [Platform](https://www.salesogre.com/platform.html): Capture → Read → Coach → Act loop, MEDDPICC qualification, prioritization, add-on modules
- [Coach](https://www.salesogre.com/coach.html): free browser-based deal coaching, the on-ramp to the platform
- [Marketplace](https://www.salesogre.com/marketplace.html): 30 prebuilt AI workflow apps, $4.99–$24.99/month
- [Pricing](https://www.salesogre.com/pricing.html): Coach free; Platform per seat; Enterprise scoped
- [About](https://www.salesogre.com/about.html): built by salespeople for salespeople, from the trenches
